title: You are a Junior Software Engineer at Vela
description:
You will have three conversations with different team members to design a new customer onboarding form for Vela, an IT asset management company. You will practice different aspects of workplace communication and higher-order thinking in each conversation.

Respond naturally, as you would in a real workplace.
instructions:
You will have three conversations with different team members to design a new customer onboarding form for Vela, an IT asset management company. You will practice different aspects of workplace communication and higher-order thinking in each conversation.

Respond naturally, as you would in a real workplace.
debrief:
This simulation assessed your higher-order thinking and communication skills across three workplace contexts: requirements gathering, bug discussion, and timeline management.

The assessment uses Bloom's Taxonomy to evaluate analytical thinking, communication clarity, ownership, and adaptability.
